# Cursor parser fixtures (synthetic)

| File | Purpose | Expected behavior |
|------|---------|-------------------|
| `valid.md` | markdown prompt export | prompt-history-only session |
| `missing-fields.md` | minimal text | metadata-only |
| `corrupt.md` | empty file | warning / empty session |
| `valid.db` | ItemTable with composer/chat JSON | sqlite prompt-history parsing |

SQLite DBs generated by `generate-sqlite-fixtures.mjs`.
